channel.title: testing on ₿itcoin Transcripts
channel.description: Recent content in testing on ₿itcoin Transcripts

item.title: CoreCheck
item.description: On PRs, Drahtbot provides a link to CoreCheck results. That’s probably most people’s interaction with CoreCheck. Coverage check Using gcc at the moment, too many false positives so probably will need to move to clang. It doesn’t seem to be used very regularly atm (getting few reports when the tool is down). Why not being used? Attendants reported unreliability to be the main reason: if it fails once, you stop looking at it.
